description: Bootstrap Next.js 14 app (manually create package.json + config since create-next-app conflicts with existing files). Install recharts, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge, swr. Set up tailwind.config.ts, globals.css, lib/types.ts, lib/mock-data.ts, lib/api.ts, lib/utils.ts, lib/bitmap-type.ts, and app/layout.tsx with Space Grotesk + Inter + JetBrains Mono fonts.
title: Phase 1: Bootstrap Next.js + foundation files
